case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION; et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SEIZURE AND NOTICE OF INITIATION OF JUDICIAL FORFEITURE PROCEEDINGS
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
STIPULAITON TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: 2004 AUDI, VIN: WA1YL64B34N023870, CALIFORNIA LICENSE # 5FAB653 BE RELEASED TO ATTY TERENCE HALLINAN ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT DYLAN P. HUNTER, UPON PAYMENT OF $5,000.00 US CURRENCY TO THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT, SAID PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CASHIER'S CHECK MADE PAYABLE TO THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT SAID PAYMENT OF $5,000.00 US CURRENCY, REFERENCED IN THE ABOVE PARAGRAPH, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
